# `nise token`

- **Usage**: `nise token <SUBCOMMAND>`
- **Source code**: [`src/cli/token/mod.rs`](https://github.com/jdx/mise/blob/main/src/cli/token/mod.rs)

Display git provider tokens nise will use

## Subcommands

- [`nise token forgejo [--unmask] [HOST]`](/cli/token/forgejo.md)
- [`nise token github [FLAGS] [HOST]`](/cli/token/github.md)
- [`nise token gitlab [--unmask] [HOST]`](/cli/token/gitlab.md)
